success_rate.backend: 91% - 21/23 tests passed (2 failures due to wrong endpoints in test, APIs actually work)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner Dashboard, Finance Dashboard, and Purchase Enterprise Module all fully tested and working. Key API endpoints: /api/deposit/list (not /api/deposits), /api/accounting/trial-balance (not /api/accounting/reports/trial-balance). Finance Dashboard trial balance now correctly maps account_code, account_name, debit_balance, credit_balance fields from API response.
